content: Folder larger than this size won't be uploaded.

comment.text: This text appears in the Portal Settings, likely within a configuration section for file uploads. It explains the maximum allowed size for a single folder when folder uploads are enabled, indicating that folders exceeding this size will not be uploaded. Translators should ensure the wording accurately conveys this size limitation.

usage.context:
config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFoldersSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFilesSizeDescription")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFileSizeDescription")
 }
 configKey="maxPerUploadSize"
 defaultValue="25"
 sizeUnits={fileSizeUnits}
